recommendations.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
recommendations.overview: Dallas, a burdened but headstrong dancer, is determined to get into the best dance school in the country—her late mother’s alma mater. However, that dream is suddenly derailed when the cheeky yet secretly grieving football star, Drayton, crashes into

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.

recommendations.title: Feel the Beat
recommendations.overview: After failing to make it on Broadway, April returns to her hometown and reluctantly begins training a misfit group of young dancers for a competition.

recommendations.title: Heavy Metal Mater
recommendations.overview: Mater and Lightning McQueen are ready to rock! When Mater's garage band, Mater and the Gas Caps, records a hit song, Mater becomes a rock legend. Then Lightning joins Mater's band for the rock concert of the century!

recommendations.title: Romy and Michele's High School Reunion
recommendations.overview: Two not-too-bright party girls reinvent themselves for their high school reunion. Armed with a borrowed Jaguar, new clothes and the story of their success as the inventors of Post-It notes, Romy and Michele descend on their alma mater, but their faça

recommendations.title: Old School
recommendations.overview: Three friends attempt to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity near their alma mater.

recommendations.title: Swing Girls
recommendations.overview: A group of delinquent high school girls form a band when they accidentally poison their school's brass band and have to replace them.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

recommendations.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
